ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained
Passion fruit, pulp and pips, raw
Kiwi fruit, pulp and seeds, raw

ingredients_text: Pineapple juice 66%, mandarin juice 20%, guava puree 4.5%, passion fruit juice 3.5%, orange juice 3%, banana puree 2%, mango puree 0.5%, papaya puree 0.2%, lime juice 0.2%, kiwi puree 0.1%.
